title: Tart Macadamia Crust Crusted Crispy Australian Fish
description: A unique fusion of flavors and textures, this dish features a crispy fish exterior paired with a crunchy macadamia and tart crust.
instructions: In a food processor, pulse macadamia nuts and crispy rice cereal until coarsely chopped.
In a bowl, mix together chopped macadamia nuts and crispy rice cereal, tart cherries, egg, salt, and black pepper.
Place a fish fillet on a flat surface and brush with olive oil.
Sprinkle the macadamia and crispy rice cereal mixture evenly over the fish fillet, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and sear the fish for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional tart cherries if desired.
